rulings.Calendar Matter: DEFENDANT CHARLIE SETO'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO 1) COMPEL ARBITRATION, AND 2) COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO FILE REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR THE COURT TO ORDER DISMISSAL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2023 line 1. DEFENDANT CHARLIE SETO'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO 1) COMPEL ARBITRATION, AND 2) COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO FILE REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR THE COURT TO ORDER DISMISSAL is continued to January 31, 2022. No later than January 17, 2023 Plaintiff to file a brief not to exceed 2 pages providing authority for filing a supplemental opposition without leave of Court 27 days after the original hearing date. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MALLORY PROPERTIES, LLC ET AL VS. MARVIN KASOFF ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2023 line 2. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. The Proof of Service filed on December 16, 2022 attests under the penalty of perjury that a sealed envelope containing the motion was served to an undisclosed e-mail address on Paul Utrecht from an undisclosed e-mail address of the sender. The Court also notes that Plaintiff appears to seek to set aside "the August 19, 2016 order of dismissal (Motion 3:4). There is no such order on file. This action was filed on November 1, 2016. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: JONES MEMORIAL HOMES, INC. VS. MARK ANTHONY SMITH
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Relief From The August 31, 2022, Deadline
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2023 line 6. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM THE AUGUST 31, 2022 DEADLINE is GRANTED based on CCP 473(b) attorney fault provision. The Court will consider awarding sanctions (limited to costs) associated with Defendant's motion to dismiss if Defendant presents evidence of such costs at the hearing (parking, copying, etc.). Plaintiff to present an order in accordance with this tentative ruling for execution (leaving the amount of sanctions blank) at the hearing. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM XIE VS. BING ZHANG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 13, 2023 line 8. DEFENDANTS BING ZHANG AND GUO ZHUO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to comply with Regulation 12.14(b)(8)(i). "Use and occupancy" is not a "reason" for moving from the current residence, it is a purpose for which the unit will be used covered in a separate requirement of 12.14(b)(8)(ii). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
